data.title: GSR proposes a new treasury-focused fund among four others in a recent filing, presenting it before the SEC.
data.description: GSR, a market maker, introduced a proposal for a treasury-focused fund among four additional proposals in a filing made on Wednesday.

data.title: Lumenuity chosen as finalist for Pepperdine's Most Fundable Companies of 2025, among top from thousands.
data.description: A groundbreaking optics company, Lumenuity, has been honored as one of the top companies out of thousands of applicants. Based in Los Angeles, the company's cutting-edge technology has the potential to significantly enhance optics performance in various products such as phones, drones, and augmented reality devices. This recognition demonstrates the company's exceptional innovation in the field.

data.title: GSR proposes novel ETF combining crypto treasuries with four other funds in a SEC filing this week.
data.description: On Wednesday, market maker GSR submitted a proposal alongside four others for a treasury-focused fund in a recent filing.

data.title: Encore Capital Group upsized senior secured notes offering to $500 million, with an issue price of 100.00%.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Encore Capital Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: ECPG) disclosed the pricing details of its offering. The company announced the sale of $500.0 million aggregate principal amount of 6.625% senior secured notes, set to mature in 2031. Originally planned at $400.0 million, the offering was increased by $100.0 million, priced at 100.00%. The sale was conducted through a private offering to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933, and to non-U.S. persons outside the United States as defined by Regulation S under the Securities Act.

data.title: Paratus Energy Services Ltd completes secondary sale of shares in Archer Limited; not for distribution in certain jurisdictions.
data.description: This information is not intended for release, publication, or distribution in Australia, Canada, Hong Kong, Japan, the United States, or any other jurisdiction where it would be deemed unlawful. The announcement does not specify the source of the news.

data.title: Daymond John to headline Event Planner Expo 2025 in NYC, gathering New York event planners, with conference set for October.
data.description: In October, New York will host the East Coast's leading events and marketing conference. The event will bring together event planners, business owners, and corporate decision-makers from around the region. EMRG Media, a renowned event planning and marketing agency based in New York, will be organizing the conference. Scheduled for September 18, 2025, this premier conference is set to attract a significant number of attendees, including industry professionals and influencers.

data.title: SJE® acquires AMI Global to enhance IIoT capabilities, aiming for a digital-first approach.
data.description: SJE, Inc., a leading control systems company based in DETROIT LAKES, Minn., revealed plans on Sept. 24, 2025, to create a digital-first setting to boost technological advancement. The company took a significant step by acquiring AMI Global from Cimbria Capital. This move aims to enhance SJE's industry position and expand its capabilities.

data.title: Decagon launches Decagon University for teams in customer experience, unveils Decagon Voice 2.0 with major upgrades.
data.description: In San Francisco today, the top AI agents platform for customer experience, Decagon, unveiled Decagon University. This flagship AI education initiative aims to equip all teams, including customer experience, product, and engineering, with the necessary skills and knowledge to develop, enhance, and expand AI agents effectively. The unveiling took place at the first-ever Decagon Dialogues event and was accompanied by the introduction of Decagon Voice 2.0. This updated version offers significant performance enhancements and cross-channel memory capabilities, further solidifying Decagon's position as a frontrunner in the AI industry.

data.title: FDA announcement on leucovorin for autism gains attention. Leucovorin could aid in improving communication, behavior in kids.
data.description: A recent study has found that prescription-strength folinic acid could have a positive impact on communication, behavior, and development in children diagnosed with autism. The study, based in Irvine, California, revealed promising results indicating an improvement in these key areas. This development comes after the U.S. Food and Drug Administration announced the initiation of the approval process for leucovorin calcium, a significant step in potentially providing access to this treatment for patients in need. Stay tuned for further updates on this breakthrough in autism intervention.

data.title: Jimmy Kimmel's comeback episode garners 6.2M viewers, nearly quadrupling the show's usual viewership.
data.description: The most recent episode of "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" following a suspension by Disney saw four times the usual number of viewers tuning in.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Indexes slightly down, hot stocks like Astera Labs and Credo Technology affected.
data.description: On Wednesday, stock market indexes experienced slight decreases, with Astera Labs and Credo Technology standing out as notable gainers amidst the overall decline. Despite this, Dow Jones Futures remained steady, with a number of popular stocks witnessing a downturn.
